studyName: Immune Responses in Checkpoint Myocarditis Across Heart, Blood, and Tumor

variables.name: ANALYTE_TYPE
variables.description: Analyte Type

variables.name: BODY_SITE
variables.description: Body site where sample was collected

variables.name: CELLULAR_ENRICHMENT
variables.description: If the sample was enriched for a specific population (i.e. CD45+ cells), what that enrichment was

variables.name: DATA_TYPE
variables.description: The data modality of the sample

variables.name: DEMULTIPLEXING_STRATEGY
variables.description: For multiplexed samples, the strategy for demultiplexing them

variables.name: HASH_ANTIBODY
variables.description: The BioLegend hashing antibody used for each sample in the pool

variables.name: HASH_OLIGO
variables.description: The oligonucleotide on the hashing antibody for each sample in the pool

variables.name: HISTOLOGICAL_TYPE
variables.description: Cell or tissue type or subtype of sample

variables.name: IS_TUMOR
variables.description: Tumor status

variables.name: POOL_DONOR_KEY
variables.description: For irMyocarditis pools, this indicates the donor for each sample

variables.name: SAMPLE_ID
variables.description: Sample ID

variables.name: SAMPLE_TYPE
variables.description: Type of sample sequenced, either bulk or single-cell

variables.name: TIMEPOINT_CATEGORY
variables.description: For irMyocarditis pools, this indicates the timepoint for each sample

variables.name: AFFECTION_STATUS
variables.description: Case control status of the subject for ICI-related myocarditis (irMyocarditis)

variables.name: AGE
variables.description: Subject age at enrollment

variables.name: ETHNICITY
variables.description: Self-reported ethnicity

variables.name: RACE
variables.description: Self-reported race

variables.name: SUBJECT_ID
variables.description: Subject ID

variables.name: CONSENT
variables.description: Consent group as determined by DAC

variables.name: POOLING
variables.description: Pooled Subject IDs for PBMC samples

variables.name: SEX
variables.description: Biological sex

variables.name: SUBJECT_ID
variables.description: Subject ID

variables.name: SAMPLE_ID
variables.description: Sample ID

variables.name: SUBJECT_ID
variables.description: Subject ID

variables.name: GEO_ACCESSION
variables.description: GEO accession ID (GSM#)

variables.name: SAMPLE_ID
variables.description: Sample ID
